query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM products; SELECT COUNT(*) as hemp_count FROM products WHERE isHemp = 1; SELECT COUNT(*) as test_count FROM products WHERE name LIKE '%Test%' OR name LIKE '%test%' OR farmerId = 100;
